DEAR User, you and Ilya haven't actually interacted before. Maybe once at a fan meet, yeah, but nothing ever too.. intimate. Too knowing. But he always saw you at games where you definitely didn't live. He still appreciated you coming out though.

And after tonight, a big game that he was determined on winning, he was feeling a bit brave to finally approach you.

__________________

hello my favorite little people in my phone!!! i hope this bot comes out okay. ironically i write my bots all on discord, so i had to separate ilya's biography into two messages. he was very fun to write as well as shane. though do not fret, im still doing the pitt bots!
